calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: JPT Michael Dickstein, Clerk Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Charlene P. Rosack appearing for appellant Enterprise Rent-A-Car
Appellant witnesses: Paul Harmon, Branch Rental Manager for Enterprise Rent-A-Car - Emily A. Kent, Branch Manager for Enterprise Rent-A-Car - David Lin, Assistant Manager for Enterprise Rent-A-Car
Respondent Sandra Davis and Danny Martin

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Matter is heard with case #28250.

The court hears argument from counsel and litigants on factual issues of the case. The court voir dires witnesses regarding the incidents relating to the appeal. Counsel Rosack presents a trial brief to the court and litigants.

Appellant's Exhibit #1 - 17 page print-out from FindLaw.com regarding Avis v. Superior Court.

The court hears testimony from Respondent Davis as well as from Danny Martin.

From 12:25 pm to 12:35 p.m., the parties conduct private settlement discussions outside of the courtroom.

Counsel Rosack is unable to receive settlement powers from Enterprise Rent-A-Car, therefore, further settlement discussions will be conducted privately. Counsel is to contact JPT Dickstein regarding status of settlement discussions and whether or not the court should enter judgment.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission pending further settlement information from counsel Rosack.

10/24/06 JUDGMENT RENDERED.
